author: Marwan Luay
description: Locally handwrite on PDFs with a stylus or mouse. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Mars
manifest.description: Locally handwrite on PDFs with a stylus or mouse.
manifest.name: Native PDF Handwriting

name: Native PDF Handwriting

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## 0.1.3

- Refresh README intro copy for Community listing.
- Same runtime as 0.1.2 (catalog fixes: settings heading, bound callbacks, minAppVersion 1.13.0).

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MarsLuay/native-pdf-handwriting/compare/0.1.2...0.1.3

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## Native PDF Handwriting 0.1.2

- Require Obsidian **1.13.0+** (`Plugin.settings` / catalog API check)
- Remove plugin-name settings heading
- Safer toolbar callback binding; activeDocument/ownerDocument hygiene

Install: copy \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, \`styles.css\` into \`<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/native-pdf-handwriting/\`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MarsLuay/native-pdf-handwriting/compare/0.1.1...0.1.2

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## Native PDF Handwriting 0.1.1

Catalog compliance release.

- Manifest id/name/description matched to listing; no \"Obsidian\" in description
- Vault DataAdapter-only I/O (no Node fs/path)
- CSS classes / setCssProps instead of static style assignments
- Setting.setHeading; Vault#configDir defaults; minAppVersion 1.8.9

### Install

Copy \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, and \`styles.css\` into \`<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/native-pdf-handwriting/\`.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/MarsLuay/native-pdf-handwriting/compare/0.1.0...0.1.1

releases.author: MarsLuay
releases.description:
## Native PDF Ink 0.1.0

Initial release.

- Handwrite on Obsidian PDFs (pen, graphite pencil, eraser, lasso)
- Vault sidecars + autosave/recovery; original PDFs unchanged; export annotated PDF
- Draw mode opt-in; zoom-friendly ink compositing

### Install

Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<Vault>/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-native-pdf-ink/`, reload Obsidian, enable the plugin.
